key_findings: BEAUTY × Evergreen (n=30, eng=33%): → indoor + warm_studio + documentary_candid
BEAUTY_PERSONAL_CARE × Evergreen (n=245, eng=1%): → retail_store + golden_hour + text_dominant
BEAUTY_PERSONAL_CARE × Ramadan (n=13, eng=7%): → studio + natural + lifestyle_integrated
F_AND_B × Evergreen (n=1046, eng=37%): → retail_urban + dramatic_moody + multi_product
F_AND_B × General (n=161, eng=28%): → restaurant + natural + text_dominant
HEALTHCARE_WELLNESS × Evergreen (n=80, eng=27%): → studio + studio + text_dominant
HEALTHCARE_WELLNESS × Ramadan (n=5, eng=20%): → unknown + natural + lifestyle_integrated
REAL_ESTATE × Evergreen (n=103, eng=2%): → office + flat_bright + text_dominant
REAL_ESTATE × Ramadan (n=3, eng=0%): → outdoor + natural + lifestyle_integrated
RETAIL × Evergreen (n=8, eng=62%): → home_domestic + natural_daylight + product_hero_closeup
RETAIL_LIFESTYLE × Evergreen (n=276, eng=6%): → office + flat_bright + text_dominant
RETAIL_LIFESTYLE × Seasonal (n=26, eng=3%): → outdoor + natural + lifestyle_integrated
FASHION × Evergreen (n=164, eng=9%): → outdoor + flat_bright + lifestyle_integrated
FASHION × Eid Al Fitr (n=37, eng=40%): → studio + golden_hour + lifestyle_integrated
Best setting: 'retail_urban' (100%) → natural_daylight light + product_hero_closeup frame
how_to_use: Step 1: client sector + content occasion → look up sector_occasion_decision_tree → get recommended_production (setting, lighting, composition, register, tone). Step 2: confirm with setting_guide — use best_lighting and best_composition for that setting. Step 3: cross-check lighting_composition_guide to ensure lighting+framing alignment.
